calendar.matters:
Notice And Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CITIBANK NA'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is granted in part. Sheriff to give $100 to the creditor and release the remaining $247.47 back to defendant. $100 per pay period to be withheld from defendant. The court does not stay this order. Order signed. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported
